title_en: BioMEMS-Based Multimodal Platform for Engineered Cardiac Tissue Monitoring
title_zh: 面向工程化心脏组织监测的 BioMEMS 多模态平台
background_en: Three-dimensional cardiac tissue models require synchronized mechanical and electrical readouts for functional evaluation.
background_zh: 三维心脏组织模型需要同步的机械与电生理读出，用于功能评价和疾病模型分析。
methods_en: Integrating MEMS strain sensing, microelectrode recording, low-noise acquisition, microscopy, and multimodal signal analysis.
methods_zh: 集成 MEMS 应变传感、微电极记录、低噪声采集、显微成像和多模态信号分析。
contribution_en: Platform design, sensing workflow integration, experimental measurement, and cardiac electromechanical feature analysis.
contribution_zh: 平台设计、传感流程集成、实验测量和心脏机电特征分析。
result_en: Current public records describe the project as an ongoing PhD-stage platform for disease modeling and cardiotoxicity evaluation.
result_zh: 当前公开记录中，该项目作为博士阶段正在推进的平台，用于疾病模型和药物心脏毒性评价。
notes: Homepage title: Biomimetic Cardiac Hypoxia Model and Electromechanical Evaluation Platform || Homepage summary: Building a biomimetic hypoxic cardiac model with integrated sensing workflows for electromechanical analysis under disease-relevant conditions. || CV title: Bioinspired Hypoxic Cardiac Model and Electromechanical Evaluation Platform || CV metadata: 2026.03-Present | MNTL | Role: Researcher and platform developer || CV details: Developed an in vitro cardiac hypoxia model combined with multimodal electromechanical readouts. | Integrated mechanical contraction sensing and electrical activity recording for functional assessment of engineered cardiac tissues. | Applied the platform to evaluate cardiac tissue response under disease-relevant microenvironmental conditions.

title_en: High-Throughput Drug Cardiotoxicity Screening Platform Based on 3D Cardiac Tissues
title_zh: 基于 3D 心脏组织的高通量药物心脏毒性筛选平台
background_en: Drug response evaluation benefits from parallelized in vitro cardiac tissue models with multiparametric functional readouts.
background_zh: 药物响应评价需要能够并行测试的体外心脏组织模型，以及多参数功能读出。
methods_en: Combining 3D cardiac tissue construction with strain-based mechanical sensing and electrophysiological monitoring.
methods_zh: 结合 3D 心脏组织构建、应变式机械检测和电生理信号监测。
contribution_en: System integration, platform optimization, data acquisition workflow design, and analysis of drug-induced functional responses.
contribution_zh: 系统集成、平台优化、数据采集流程设计和药物诱导功能响应分析。
result_en: Related outputs are reflected in selected publications and international conference presentations.
result_zh: 相关成果体现在代表性论文和国际会议记录中。
notes: Homepage title: High-Throughput Drug Toxicity Screening Platform Based on 3D Cardiac Tissue || Homepage summary: Developing a 3D cardiac tissue platform for parallelized pharmacological testing with integrated electromechanical readouts. || CV title: High-Throughput Drug Toxicity Screening Platform Based on 3D Cardiac Tissues || CV metadata: 2024.03-2026.03 | MNTL | Role: Researcher and system integrator || CV details: Designed and optimized a 3D cardiac tissue-based sensing platform for drug cardiotoxicity evaluation. | Integrated strain-based mechanical sensing and electrophysiological readouts. | Supported long-term monitoring and multiparametric analysis of drug-induced functional responses.

title_en: Graphene/SU-8 Conductive Microenvironment for Cardiomyocyte Maturation
title_zh: Graphene/SU-8 导电微环境对心肌细胞成熟的调控
background_en: Conductive microenvironments can regulate cardiomyocyte maturation and intercellular electrophysiological communication.
background_zh: 导电微环境能够调控心肌细胞成熟和细胞间电生理通讯。
methods_en: Developing graphene/SU-8 platforms and evaluating cardiomyocyte functional maturation, contraction, and field-potential behavior.
methods_zh: 开发 graphene/SU-8 平台，并评价心肌细胞功能成熟、收缩和场电位行为。
contribution_en: Platform development, experimental implementation, data interpretation, and manuscript/conference output preparation.
contribution_zh: 平台开发、实验实施、数据解释以及论文和会议成果准备。
result_en: The project supported the ACS Nano publication on enhanced cardiomyocyte maturation and intercellular communication.
result_zh: 该项目支撑了 ACS Nano 关于促进心肌细胞成熟和细胞间通讯的论文发表。
notes: Homepage title: Regulatory Mechanisms of Graphene Conductive Microenvironments in Cardiomyocyte Electrophysiological Communication and Maturation || Homepage summary: Investigating how graphene-based conductive microenvironments modulate cardiomyocyte communication, maturation, and functional electrophysiology. || CV title: Graphene-Conductive Microenvironment for Cardiomyocyte Maturation and Electrophysiological Communication || CV metadata: 2022.09-2024.03 | MNTL | Role: Platform developer and experimental researcher || CV details: Investigated conductive microenvironment effects on cardiomyocyte maturation and intercellular communication. | Developed graphene/SU-8-based platforms for cardiac tissue functional enhancement. | Contributed to journal publication and conference outputs.
